title: New, non-underwear hat logo artwork
body: This is the new version of the logo we'd worked on + an update to the README to pull in the new logo.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
Looks like some of the patches are missing a 'Signed-off-by:' in their commit logs.

@mairin You need to do a

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force
to add your signature to your PRs.
#359 replaced this PR and it has been merged.  I'm going to close this one.  @mairin TYVM for the logo updates!
